data.body:
we want to have a pulldown on the left with agents currently configured as part of the pool for any step - and then a pulldown on the right with all available agents.

then a button that executes a swap in the agent pools config.

the idea is that the user can pick an agent and replace (swap) with a different agent.  Most useful for version upgrades, but can be done for any reason.
data.title: settings: dispatch: pools:  add a model swap function
